description:
DSRs completed marker format doesn't match DSPy's.

**Problem:**
DSRs (chat.rs:213):
  '[[ ## completed ## ]]\n'

DSPy (chat_adapter.py:209):
  '\n\n[[ ## completed ## ]]\n'

DSPy adds two leading newlines before the completed marker.

**Fix:** Update format_assistant_message() to prepend '\n\n' before completed marker.

**Refs:**
- DSRs: crates/dspy-rs/src/adapter/chat.rs:213
- DSPy: dspy/adapters/chat_adapter.py:209
title: ChatAdapter: Add leading newlines to completed marker
